plugins.name: supergraph
plugins.description:
Most AI coding tools work blind — they read a few files, guess what else might break, and hope for the best. Supergraph fixes that.

Before writing a single line, Supergraph builds an AST dependency graph of your entire codebase and uses it to answer questions that matter: Which files does this change actually affect? Is this a hub node connected to 20 other modules? Will this rename orphan a caller three layers deep?

Every step of the coding workflow — plan, implement, fix, review — is grounded in that graph. Claude stops guessing and starts reasoning from evidence.

---

HOW IT WORKS

Supergraph is a chain of 22 skills that enforce a complete, evidence-based dev cycle:

  scan → analyze → plan → tdd → execute → fix → integration → verify → review

Each skill has a single job and hands off to the next. The chain cannot be shortcut: no production code without a failing test, no merge without a graph-aware review, no "done" claim without fresh proof.

Smart hooks fire automatically in the background — detecting test failures and suggesting diagnose, warning before context compacts, blocking writes when no approved plan exists, auto-updating the graph after every file change.

---

WHAT MAKES IT DIFFERENT

• Blast radius before every change — know exactly which files break before you touch anything
• Hub node protection — Claude stops and asks before modifying highly-connected files
• Serena LSP integration — find every caller, safe codebase-wide rename, type diagnostics from the language server
• Structured debugging — 6-phase diagnose loop with deterministic hypothesis/instrument/fix cycle
• Session handoff — compress full session state in seconds; resume in a new window with zero context loss
• Token-compression mode — ~75% output reduction for long sessions (caveman mode)
• CONTEXT.md vocabulary — shared domain glossary that grows across sessions, reducing inconsistency in plans and reviews

---

SUPPORTED STACKS

Auto-detected from config files: Node.js/TypeScript, Flutter/Dart, PHP, Python, Go, Rust.
Specialized skills for Flutter/Dart code review, database migrations (PostgreSQL, Prisma, Drizzle, Django, golang-migrate), frontend UI design, and Playwright web testing.

---

SKILLS INCLUDED (22 total)

Core workflow: scan, analyze, plan, execute, tdd, fix, integration, verify, review
Debugging: diagnose, zoom-out, architecture
Requirements: prd, triage, prototype
Productivity: handoff, caveman
Domain: serena, database-migrations, flutter-dart-code-review, frontend-design, webapp-testing
